---
title: "Scopus"
page-layout: article
---

# Scopus

**Provider:** Elsevier

## Description

Academic abstract and citation database covering peer-reviewed journals, conference proceedings, and books across scientific, medical, technical, and social science fields. Supports literature review and citation analysis.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Social Sciences, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1190)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
